functionDeclarations.name: list_pdf_templates
functionDeclarations.description: List all PDF templates (global templates and per-store overrides). No server-side type filter — read the `type` field and filter client-side. Returns each template's `content`. (GET /api/pdf-templates)

functionDeclarations.name: get_pdf_template
functionDeclarations.description: Get one template, including its `content` HTML, `updated_at` (optimistic-lock token), `store_id`, and `schema`/`variables_tree` (the variables and assets the template may use). (GET /api/pdf-templates/{id})

functionDeclarations.name: validate_pdf_template
functionDeclarations.description: Validate draft `content` WITHOUT rendering. Returns { ok, errors[], warnings[] }. Run this after every edit and fix all errors before previewing or saving. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/validate)

content.description: The draft HTML/Mustache template source to validate.

functionDeclarations.name: preview_pdf_template
functionDeclarations.description: Render draft `content` (unsaved) to a preview. format=pdf (default) returns { pdf: <base64>, type, rendered_with }; format=html returns { html: <string> }. For the `packing` type only, pass sales_order_id to render against a real order's data. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/preview)

content.description: The draft HTML to render (renders THIS, not the stored content).

format.description: pdf (default, base64 PDF) or html (interactive HTML string).

sales_order_id.description: Render against a real sales order's data. Only honoured for the `packing` type; ignored (mock data used) for every other type.

functionDeclarations.name: search_sales_orders
functionDeclarations.description: Find up to 20 real sales orders (newest first) to preview a packing slip against. Use this to build a QA matrix of different document shapes (short, multi-page, per-store, …). (GET /api/pdf-templates/search-sales-orders)

store_id.description: Restrict to one store — use to get an order per store for cross-store QA.

functionDeclarations.name: preview_with_sales_order
functionDeclarations.description: Render the store's EFFECTIVE saved packing-slip template against a real order (base64 PDF). Resolves the right template by the order's store. Packing slips only. (POST /api/pdf-templates/preview-sales-order)

sales_order_id.description: The sales order id to render.

functionDeclarations.name: update_pdf_template
functionDeclarations.description: Save new `content` for a template. Only `content` is writable. Pass back the `updated_at` you read from get-pdf-template for stale-write protection. Snapshots the prior version. Returns 422 if content fails validation. (PUT /api/pdf-templates/{id})

updated_at.description: Optimistic-lock guard — the `updated_at` value from get-pdf-template. If it no longer matches (someone else saved), the write is rejected so you don't clobber their change.

functionDeclarations.name: list_pdf_template_versions
functionDeclarations.description: List saved versions of a template (paginated, newest first) — each with its historical `content`, `source`, and `created_at`. Use to find a good version to restore. (GET /api/pdf-templates/{id}/versions)

functionDeclarations.name: restore_pdf_template_version
functionDeclarations.description: Roll a template back to a prior version's content (snapshots the current one first). The safety net if an edit goes wrong. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/versions/{versionId}/restore)

functionDeclarations.name: reset_pdf_template
functionDeclarations.description: Reset a template to SKU.io's stock default content (snapshots the prior version). (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/reset)

functionDeclarations.name: list_store_overrides
functionDeclarations.description: List every per-store override template for a document type. Use to audit that all stores' templates are consistent before/after an edit. (GET /api/pdf-templates/{type}/store-overrides)

type.description: Template type value, e.g. packing, quote, sales_order, purchase_order.

functionDeclarations.name: create_store_override
functionDeclarations.description: Clone a global template into a store-specific override so one store can differ. The override then has its own id/content you edit independently. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/store-override)

id.description: The GLOBAL template id to clone.

store_id.description: The store the override is for.

functionDeclarations.name: list_pdf_template_assets
functionDeclarations.description: List uploaded template image assets (logos, footer banners). Each returns its `slug`, `token` ({{{asset.<slug>}}}), `mime_type`, and `width`/`height`. (GET /api/pdf-template-assets)

functionDeclarations.name: upload_pdf_template_asset
functionDeclarations.description: Upload an image (multipart/form-data) to use in a template. Returns the `slug` and the ready-to-paste `token`. Reference it in `content` as {{{asset.<slug>}}}. (POST /api/pdf-template-assets)

image.description: The image file (multipart/form-data field `image`). mimes: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp; max 5 MB. Prefer PNG/JPG — webp can drop out of the exported PDF.

name.description: Display name (max 120 chars); the slug is derived from it.
